name: Non Emergency Transportation
notes: Input address 101 Staton Ct, Greenville NC 27834 matches MedEx Medical Transport Service Inc (per BBB, Yellowpages, LoopNet listing of 103 Staton Ct adjoining), which provides non-emergency medical transportation services. SAFER keyword searches for 'MEDEX', 'MEDEX MEDICAL', 'MED EX', and 'NON EMERGENCY TRANSPORTATION' returned no Greenville, NC carrier. MedEx may operate under a parent entity, may be intrastate-only without USDOT, or may use a different legal name. NC SOS lookup needed manually; no online registry hit confirmed. Per LinkedIn/website, MedEx founded approximately 2010, headquartered in Ahoskie, NC (HQ) with Greenville location.

Address 24901 Northwestern Hwy Ste 209, Southfield MI 48075 confirmed via company website, BBB, Facebook, ZoomInfo. Established 2003 per company Facebook post and website. Likely intrastate-only Michigan operator not required to register with USDOT. Inc date 2003 sourced from company self-reported history, not state registry.
